title: ChessFriends Tuusula
welcome: Love chess? Join our community! Challenge your mind, meet new people, and enjoy exciting games in a friendly atmosphere. Everyone is welcome!
aboutText: ChessFriends Tuusula is a friendly chess club open to players of all ages and skill levels. Whether you are a beginner or an experienced player, you are welcome to join us for enjoyable games, learning opportunities, and making new friends.
meetingText: Join us every Thursday from 4:30 PM to 6:30 PM. Our sessions last approximately two hours and offer a great opportunity to play chess, improve your skills, and meet fellow chess enthusiasts in a friendly atmosphere.
